digest.greeting: Jean, today had useful movement on the Product-team vision thread, with Nadia acknowledging your follow-up after you clarified Quality's role. The main carry-forward is still keeping the SMART-goals work, Staff Augmentation BA rationale, TRACE follow-up, and intake routing clean for tomorrow.

items.label: Closed the Product-team vision Q&A with Nadia
items.detail: Jean replied to Nadia's Product-team vision thread with context on Procurement and Quality, and Nadia acknowledged the follow-up later in the day.

items.label: Turn the KPI set into SMART goals
items.detail: Keep this first for Thursday. The Sara thread still needs a concrete SMART-goal framing rather than a loose KPI discussion.

items.label: Write Anu about why Staff Augmentation needs a BA
items.detail: Use the Staff Augmentation thread as the source: Jorge framed the BA as needed for MVP architecture support, smoother onboarding, less BA/PM/stakeholder back-and-forth, and fewer roadblocks once Tim and Jay share the solution.

items.label: Coordinate the TRACE and Portfolio Review follow-ups
items.detail: Keep Jorge's Portfolio Review recap and the TRACE update question for Jill in one path. Confirm what Jean needs to provide before the Wednesday Portfolio Review cadence settles.

items.label: Triage the Mental Health Eval Expansion intake
items.detail: Jorge assigned Jean the Asana task under PMO New Project Intakes. Decide whether it needs portfolio review, owner assignment, or intake clarification before it becomes another loose queue item.

items.label: Review the Salesforce roadmap tracker
items.detail: The Product-team vision Q&A moved today, but Nadia also shared the LLF Salesforce Release Enforcement Tracker. Keep the tracker review tied to monthly Product, Security, and Application Development planning.

items.label: Capture PM Feedback next steps cleanly
items.detail: Keep any Sara, Eugenia, or Stephanie guidance in one usable next-step note with an owner, so the feedback thread does not get diluted into broader portfolio work.

items.label: Review the IT spreadsheets with Mar
items.detail: The Post-submission Case Change and Missing EAD taskset spreadsheets still need a clean routing decision. Mauricio also asked Mar to confirm whether Dana's solution for Halo ticket 0027951 worked, so keep that confirmation with the same taskset path.

items.label: Triage the intake routing queue
items.detail: Keep the Phase 1 intake alert and the newer CoE intake handoff separated by owner and queue path so neither sits as an ambiguous routing item.

items.label: Respond to Danny's Incident Response implementation note
items.detail: Danny's point was about adoption: the IRG outputs need to be understandable to the team, not just complete as documents. A short reply or next-step note keeps the July 15 draft path aligned with rollout.

items.label: Adjust to the EPMO Liderazgo cadence change
items.detail: Sara's update moved the leadership conversation away from the Monday forum. Use 1:1s and the Friday EOW check-in for individual questions instead of waiting for that meeting.

items.label: Procurement is part of third-party-vendor product planning
items.detail: In the Product-team vision thread, Nadia confirmed she has been engaging Jarid on Procurement for new products or solutions that need a third-party vendor.

items.label: EPMO EOW Check In
items.detail: Moved one hour earlier and expanded to include Nadia for programmatic updates.

items.label: Amazon Connect - Delay's Overview
items.detail: Nadia's note says the team is consolidating project-delay background for Danny and Jeff to answer Jon's ask.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected time before the afternoon meeting stack.

items.label: 1:1 Thiago and Jean
items.detail: Useful structure-change and transition follow-up slot.

items.label: Mkt / Legal Portfolio Review
items.detail: Portfolio review with Eugenia and Jean on the invite; likely relevant to broader Portfolio Review cleanup.

items.label: SMS Automation Optimization Weekly Project Status
items.detail: Agenda includes progress, priorities, resource check, risks, blockers, escalations, and next steps.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team coordination forum for project progress, roadblocks, knowledge-sharing, and strategic initiative momentum.
